purge.description: Starts purge task - to clean up old data from your database.

keep_days.name: Days to keep
keep_days.description: Number of days to keep the data in the database. Starting today, counting backward. A value of `7` means that everything older than a week will be purged.

entity_globs.name: Entity globs to remove
entity_globs.description: List of glob patterns used to select the entities for which the data is to be removed from the Recorder database.

keep_days.name: Days to keep
keep_days.description: Number of days to keep the data for rows matching the filter. Starting today, counting backward. A value of `7` means that everything older than a week will be purged. The default of 0 days will remove all matching rows immediately.

snapshot_entities.description: List of entities to be included in the snapshot. By taking a snapshot, you record the current state of those entities. If you do not want to use the current state of all your entities for this scene, you can combine 'Entities snapshot' with 'Entity states'.

transition.name: Transition
transition.description: Time it takes the devices to transition into the states defined in the scene.

stop_log_objects.description: Stops logging growth of objects in memory.

query.description: A query for the Home Assistant database. The result of the query is used as the value of the variable.
query.example: SELECT COUNT(*) AS todays_diaper_count FROM events WHERE event_type = 'diaper_event' AND time_fired BETWEEN DATETIME('now', 'start of day') and DATETIME('now');

column.name: Column

restore.name: Restore

Prompt for text to return with the event

speak_alarm_stream.name: Speak: Alarm stream
speak_alarm_stream.description:
By default Text To Speech notifications use the music stream so they will bypass the ringer mode on the device as long as the device's volume is not set to 0. You have the option of using `media_stream: alarm_stream` to have your notification spoken regardless of music volume.
If you find that your alarm stream volume is too low you can use `media_stream: alarm_stream_max` which will temporarily set the alarm stream volume to the max level, play the notification and then revert back to the original volume level.

notify_devices.name: Device to notify
notify_devices.description: Device needs to run the official Home Assistant app to receive notifications. If not specified, then all devices are used.

exclude_notify_devices.name: Exclude Device to notify
exclude_notify_devices.description: Device needs to run the official Home Assistant app to receive notifications. If not specified, then all devices are used.

notify_home_or_away.name: Notify those that are Home or Away?
notify_home_or_away.description:
With this option you can filter the devices based on their location. 
• Select `Home` when you only want to notify those devices that are in the zone Home.
• Select `Away` when you only want to notify those devices that are NOT in the zone Home.
• Select `Both` when it does not matter where those devices are, they will be notified. 
• Select `Prefer Home otherwise Away` when you need to notify those that are home, or when none the devices are home then notify those that are away.
If not specified, then `Both` will be used.

data_notification_icon.name: Android Only - Notification icon (Optional)
data_notification_icon.description: Change the default notification status bar icon to an mdi icon

data_notification_color.name: Android Only - Color of the notification icon (Optional)
data_notification_color.description: In Android you can set the color of the notification icon

data_subtitle.name: Notification Subtitle / subject (Optional)
data_subtitle.description: Subtitles and subjects are secondary headings

notify_message.name: Notification message
notify_message.example: There is somebody at the door!

notify_tts.name: Android Only - Notify using TTS
notify_tts.description:
Get your (Andriod) device to speak the notification.
Use the notification message (`notify_message`), required when used with TTS.
**NOTE** The Notification title (`notify_title`) will be ignored

notify_tts_in_car.name: Android Only - Notify using TTS whilst using Andriod Auto? (Optional)
notify_tts_in_car.description:
Upgrade the notification message to a TTS message, when the `binary_sensor.###_android_auto` is `on`.
This can be useful whilst driving with Android Auto that the notification that you are sending is announched via TTS.

data_group.name: Notification grouping (Optional)
data_group.description: Combine notification together visually. Custom values are allowed.

data_channel.name: Android Only - Notification channel (Optional)
data_channel.description:
Notification channels allows users to separate their notifications easily (i.e. alarm vs laundry) so they can customize aspects like what type of sound is made and a lot of other device specific features.
Devices running Android 8.0+ are able to create and manage notification channels on the fly using automations.
Once a channel is created you can navigate to your notification settings and you will find the newly created channel, from there you can customize the behavior based on what your device allows.
Custom values are allowed.

data_channel_remove.name: Android Only - Removing a Notification channel (Optional)
data_channel_remove.description:
If you wish to remove a channel. Depending on when you installed the app you may want to enable this option with the Notification channel (`data_channel`) `default` to clean up the old default channel
*WARNING* The Notification Message (`notify_message`) will be ignored/overwritten.

data_tag.name: Notification tag (Optional)
data_tag.description: Replace an existing notification by using a tag for the notification. All subsequent notifications will take the place of a notification with the same tag. Custom values are allowed.

data_tag_clear_notification.name: Remove Notifications
data_tag_clear_notification.description:
Removes the notification(s) with a certain tag (see Notification tag `data_tag`). 
To remove/clear the persistent notification(s): Use Notification tag `data_tag: persistant`. *WARNING* The Notification Message (`notify_message`) will be ignored/overwritten.

data_alert_once.name: Android Only - Alert Once
data_alert_once.description:
On Android you have the option for making a notification only alert once on the device. 
This means it will only make a sound, vibrate and/or flash the LED once. 
*WARNING* This must be used with a certain tag (see Notification tag `data_tag`).

data_importance.name: Important notification
data_importance.description: Notifications will appear immediately in most cases. However, in some cases (such as phone being stationary or when screen has been turned off for prolonged period of time) and this is to override that default behavior

data_device_ring.name: Device Ring (Optional)
data_device_ring.description: Make the device ring even if on vibrate/silent ringer mode. Max will Only work for TTS messages

data_visibility.name: Android Only - Lock Screen Visibility (Optional)
data_visibility.description: How much of a notification is visible on the lock screen

data_sticky.name: Android Only - Keep notification? (Optional)
data_sticky.description: Keep the notification from being dismissed when the user selects it

data_persistent.name: Android Only - Persistent notification? (Optional)
data_persistent.description: Persistent notifications are notifications that cannot be dismissed by swiping away. It requires the Notification tag to be set. If not set it will set it to persistent.

data_timeout.name: Android Only - Timeout message in seconds (Optional)
data_timeout.description: How many seconds a notification will be shown on a users device before being removed/dismissed automatically.

data_chronometer.name: Android Only - The timestamp of the notification (Optional)
data_chronometer.description: Shows a timestamp. Notification will not disappear when the timer reaches 0. Instead, it will continue decrementing into negative values.

data_chronometer_enable.name: Android Only - (when combined with data_chronometer) Enable the Notifications timer with a count up/down timer (Optional)
data_chronometer_enable.description: Show a count up/down timer. Notification will not disappear when the timer reaches 0. Instead, it will continue decrementing into negative values.

data_critical.name: iOS Only - Critical notification? (Optional)
data_critical.description: Critical alerts always appear at the top of your lock screen above all other notifications, and play a sound even if Do Not Disturb is enabled or the iPhone is muted.

data_ios_sound.name: iOS Only - Sounds? (Optional)
data_ios_sound.description: TTS is [not supported on iOS](https://companion.home-assistant.io/docs/notifications/notifications-basic#text-to-speech-notifications) so the workaround is by using custom sounds. For more information click [here](https://companion.home-assistant.io/docs/notifications/notification-sounds#custom-push-notification-sounds). Adding a custom sound to a notification allows you to easily identify the notification without even looking at your device. You must use the full filename (including extension) in the payload. If "iOS Only - Sound Volume Level" is not defined, then it will set the default sound level to 50%. Custom values are allowed, as long as they match the sound file.

data_ios_sound_volumelevel.name: iOS Only - Sound Volume Level (Optional)
data_ios_sound_volumelevel.description: The volume level of notification, were 1 equal to 100% volume. It requires iOS only - Sounds to be defined.

data_ios_badge.name: iOS Only - Badge (Optional)
data_ios_badge.description: Set the app icon badge in the payload. It will make the app icon badge show the number

data_ios_interruption_level.name: iOS Only - Interruption Level (Optional)
data_ios_interruption_level.description: Set the interruption level of a notification

data_ios_presentation_options.name: iOS Only - Presentation Options (Optional)
data_ios_presentation_options.description: By default, if the app is open (in the foreground) when a notification arrives, it will display the same as when the app is not active (in the background), with a visual alert showing notification contents, a badge update (if one was sent in the notification) and the sound of your choice.

data_camera.name: Camera (Optional)
data_camera.description: The camera which creates the snapshot

data_clickaction.name: Entity ID to navigate to (Optional)
data_clickaction.description: The Entity to navigate to when clicking on the notification

data_clickaction_url.name: URL to navigate to (Optional)
data_clickaction_url.description: The URL to navigate to when clicking on the notification (custom values allowed)

data_actions.name: Custom Actions (Optional)
data_actions.example:
- action: "ALARM" # The key you are sending for the event
  title: "Sound Alarm" # The button title
- action: "URI" # Must be set to URI if you plan to use a URI
  title: "Open Url"
  uri: "https://google.com" # URL to open when action is selected, can also be a lovelace view/dashboard

ac_limit.description: max charge capacity using AC charger

set_charging_current.name: Set AC charging current
set_charging_current.description: Sets the AC charging current capacity

schedule_charging_and_climate.name: Schedule charging and climate
schedule_charging_and_climate.description: Please use cautiously - Schedule charging and climate.  Not all options are available on all cars or regions.  Use your car's mobile app as a guide and match the options available in your car.

first_departure_days.name: 1st departure days
first_departure_days.description: Days which first departure applies to. Cannot be empty.

first_departure_time.name: 1st departure time
first_departure_time.description: First departure time. Use 00, 10, 20, 30, 40 or 50 for minute, and 00 for second

second_departure_days.name: 2nd departure days
second_departure_days.description: Days which second departure applies to. Cannot be empty.

second_departure_time.name: 2nd departure time
second_departure_time.description: Second departure time. Use 00, 10, 20, 30, 40 or 50 for minute, and 00 for second

off_peak_start_time.name: Off-peak start time
off_peak_start_time.description: Off-peak start time. Use 00, 10, 20, 30, 40 or 50 for minute, and 00 for second

off_peak_end_time.name: Off-peak end time
off_peak_end_time.description: Off-peak end time. Use 00, 10, 20, 30, 40 or 50 for minute, and 00 for second

off_peak_charge_only_enabled.name: Off-peak tariffs only
off_peak_charge_only_enabled.description: If true, charge only during the defined off-peak time, otherwise, charging may start before the off-peak time

climate_enabled.name: Climate
climate_enabled.description: Enable the HVAC System prior to departure

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description: Set temperature of climate control. Unit is specific to region.

temperature_unit.name: Temperature Unit
temperature_unit.description: Set temperature unit of climate control. Unit is specific to region.

defrost.name: Defrost
defrost.description: Front Windshield Defrost prior to departure

start_hazard_lights.name: Turn on the hazard lights
start_hazard_lights.description: Turn on the hazard lights for 30 seconds.

start_hazard_lights_and_horn.name: Turn on the hazard lights and horn
start_hazard_lights_and_horn.description: Turn on the hazard lights and horn for 30 seconds.

start_valet_mode.name: Start valet mode
start_valet_mode.description: Activate valet mode. If remote valet mode is activated while driving, the vehicle display screen is deactivated.

set_windows.name: Set Windows
set_windows.description: Control the windows of the vehicle. Open or close windows as needed.

flwindow.name: Front Left Window
flwindow.description: Action for the front left window

frwindow.name: Front Right Window
frwindow.description: Action for the front right window

rrwindow.name: Rear Right Window
rrwindow.description: Action for the rear right window

rlwindow.name: Rear Left Window
rlwindow.description: Action for the rear left window

see.name: See
see.description: Manually update the records of a seen legacy device tracker in the known_devices.yaml file.

dev_id.name: Device ID
dev_id.description: ID of the device (find the ID in `known_devices.yaml`).

location_name.name: Location
location_name.description: Name of the location where the device is located. The options are: `home`, `not_home`, or the name of the zone.

gps.name: GPS coordinates
gps.description: GPS coordinates where the device is located, specified by latitude and longitude (for example: [51.513845, -0.100539]).

add_to_playlist.name: Add to playlist
add_to_playlist.description: Adds music to the default playlist (i.e. playlistid=0).

media_type.name: Media type
media_type.description: Media type identifier. It must be one of 'SONG' or 'ALBUM'.

media_id.name: Media ID
media_id.description: Unique ID of the media entry to add (`songid` or albumid`). If not defined, Media name and Artist name are needed to search the Kodi music library.

media_name.name: Media name
media_name.description: Optional media name for filtering media. Can be 'ALL' when Media type is 'ALBUM' and Artist name is specified, to add all songs from one artist.

artist_name.name: Artist name
artist_name.description: Optional artist name for filtering media.

call_method.name: Call method
call_method.description: Calls a Kodi JSONRPC API method with optional parameters. Results of the Kodi API call will be redirected in a Home Assistant event: `kodi_call_method_result`.

method.name: Method
method.description: Name of the Kodi JSONRPC API method to be called.

show_lovelace_view.name: Show dashboard view
show_lovelace_view.description: Shows a dashboard view on a Chromecast device.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Media player entity to show the dashboard view on.

dashboard_path.name: Dashboard path
dashboard_path.description: The URL path of the dashboard to show, defaults to lovelace if not specified.

view_path.name: View path
view_path.description: The URL path of the dashboard view to show.

temperature.name: Temperature
temperature.description: New target temperature for the water heater.

operation_mode.name: Operation mode
operation_mode.description: New value of the operation mode. For a list of possible modes, refer to the integration documentation.

operation_mode.name: Operation mode
operation_mode.description: New value of the operation mode. For a list of possible modes, refer to the integration documentation.

start.name: Start
start.description: Starts or resumes the cleaning task.

return_to_base.name: Return to dock
return_to_base.description: Tells the vacuum cleaner to return to its dock.

clean_spot.name: Clean spot
clean_spot.description: Tells the vacuum cleaner to do a spot clean-up.

set_fan_speed.name: Set fan speed
set_fan_speed.description: Sets the fan speed of the vacuum cleaner.

fan_speed.name: Fan speed
fan_speed.description: Fan speed. The value depends on the integration. Some integrations have speed steps, like 'medium'. Some use a percentage, between 0 and 100.

send_command.name: Send command
send_command.description: Sends a command to the vacuum cleaner.

command.name: Command
command.description: Command to execute. The commands are integration-specific.

params.name: Parameters
params.description: Parameters for the command. The parameters are integration-specific.

vacuum_remote_control_start.name: Vacuum remote control start
vacuum_remote_control_start.description: Starts remote control of the vacuum cleaner. You can then move it with the 'Vacuum remote control move' action, when done use 'Vacuum remote control stop'.

vacuum_remote_control_stop.name: Vacuum remote control stop
vacuum_remote_control_stop.description: Stops remote control mode of the vacuum cleaner.

vacuum_remote_control_move.name: Vacuum remote control move
vacuum_remote_control_move.description: Remote controls the vacuum cleaner, make sure you first set it in remote control mode with the 'Vacuum remote control start' action.

vacuum_remote_control_move_step.name: Vacuum remote control move step
vacuum_remote_control_move_step.description: Remote controls the vacuum cleaner, only makes one move and then stops.

vacuum_clean_zone.name: Vacuum clean zone
vacuum_clean_zone.description: Starts the cleaning operation in the selected areas for the number of repeats indicated.

zone.name: Zone
zone.description: Array of zones. Each zone is an array of 4 integer values.

repeats.name: Repeats
repeats.description: Number of cleaning repeats for each zone.

vacuum_goto.name: Vacuum go to
vacuum_goto.description: Sends the robot to the specified coordinates.

vacuum_clean_segment.name: Vacuum clean segment
vacuum_clean_segment.description: Starts cleaning of the specified segment(s).

calendar_id.name: Calendar ID
calendar_id.description: The id of the calendar you want.

summary.name: Summary
summary.description: Acts as the title of the event.

description.name: Description
description.description: The description of the event. Optional.

start_date_time.name: Start time
start_date_time.description: The date and time the event should start.

end_date_time.name: End time
end_date_time.description: The date and time the event should end.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: The date the whole day event should start.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: The date the whole day event should end.

in.name: In
in.description: Days or weeks that you want to create the event in.

summary.name: Summary
summary.description: Acts as the title of the event.

description.name: Description
description.description: The description of the event. Optional.

start_date_time.name: Start time
start_date_time.description: The date and time the event should start.

end_date_time.name: End time
end_date_time.description: The date and time the event should end.

start_date.name: Start date
start_date.description: The date the whole day event should start.

end_date.name: End date
end_date.description: The date the whole day event should end.

in.name: In
in.description: Days or weeks that you want to create the event in.

location.name: Location
location.description: The location of the event. Optional.

snapshot.name: Snapshot
snapshot.description: Takes a snapshot of a media player.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Name of entity that will be snapshot.

with_group.name: With group
with_group.description: Whether the snapshot should include the group layout and the state of other speakers in the group.

restore.name: Restore
restore.description: Restores a snapshot of a media player.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: Name of entity that will be restored.

with_group.name: With group
with_group.description: Whether the group layout and the state of other speakers in the group should also be restored.

sleep_time.name: Sleep Time
sleep_time.description: Number of seconds to set the timer.

update_alarm.name: Update alarm
update_alarm.description: Updates an alarm with new time and volume settings.

alarm_id.name: Alarm ID
alarm_id.description: The ID of the alarm to be updated.

enabled.name: Alarm enabled
enabled.description: Whether or not to enable the alarm.

include_linked_zones.name: Include linked zones
include_linked_zones.description: Whether the alarm also plays on grouped players.

play_queue.name: Play queue
play_queue.description: Starts playing the queue from the first item.

queue_position.name: Queue position
queue_position.description: Position of the song in the queue to start playing from.

remove_from_queue.name: Remove from queue
remove_from_queue.description: Removes an item from the queue.

queue_position.name: Queue position
queue_position.description: Position in the queue to remove.

get_queue.name: Get queue
get_queue.description: Returns the contents of the queue.

trigger.name: Trigger
trigger.description: Triggers the actions of an automation.

skip_condition.name: Skip conditions
skip_condition.description: Defines whether or not the conditions will be skipped.

announce.name: Announce
announce.description: Lets a satellite announce a message.

message.example: Time to wake up!
message.name: Message

media_id.name: Media ID
media_id.description: The media ID to announce instead of using text-to-speech.

preannounce.name: Preannounce
preannounce.description: Play a sound before the announcement.

preannounce_media_id.name: Preannounce media ID
preannounce_media_id.description: Custom media ID to play before the announcement.

start_conversation.name: Start conversation
start_conversation.description: Starts a conversation from a satellite.

start_message.example: You left the lights on in the living room. Turn them off?
start_message.name: Message

start_media_id.name: Media ID
start_media_id.description: The media ID to start with instead of using text-to-speech.

extra_system_prompt.name: Extra system prompt
extra_system_prompt.description: Provide background information to the AI about the request.

preannounce.name: Preannounce
preannounce.description: Play a sound before the start message or media.

preannounce_media_id.name: Preannounce media ID
preannounce_media_id.description: Custom media ID to play before the start message or media.
